Database.description: The name of the database containing the schemas

DbUser.description: The database user for temporary credentials

SecretArn.description: ARN of the secret in Secrets Manager

SchemaPattern.description: A pattern to filter schemas. Uses SQL LIKE syntax where underscore matches one character and percent matches zero or more characters.

MaxResults.description: Maximum number of schemas to return

NextToken.description: Pagination token for the next page
